form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming finished fourth of 12 starters at Pau on February 6 over 4100m, on heavy track; 10 len behind Exciting Hunt with 68kg at $7.80. Last start won by 7 len Moulins on March 21 over 3800m slow going defeating Risk Of Love with 68kg in a hurdle. Must be a chance again.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Freshened for 39 days. Fresh up after 11 months favourite; won by 1.3 len this track on March 1 over 3600m defeating Mustang De Mee carrying 71kg at $2.40 in a steeplechase. Previously second-up finished fourth of 7 starters at this track on April 15 over 3500m, 24 len behind Lanivtsi with 67kg at $4.90. Big chance to go two-for-two this prep.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after four months finished fifth in a small field at this track in the G2 on March 22 over 3900m, on slow going 24 len behind Leader Sport carrying 68kg at $6.10. Key runner who is expected to feature.
